zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Root Sr.於1605年1月16日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比時，他的父親John Root I35歲，母親Ann Rushall25歲。他於1640年與Mary Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1637年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓並於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德且於1659年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他去世於1694年7月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年89歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Root Sr. was born on 16 January 1605, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, his father, John Root I, was 35 and his mother, Ann Rushall, was 25. He married Mary Clark in 1640, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1637 and lived in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1639 and Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1659. He died on 17 July 1694, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 89, and was buried in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Root Sr.が1605年1月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで生まれた時，父John Root Iは35歳，母Ann Rushallは25歳であった。1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでMary Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンに移住し，1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードに，1659年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンに住んでいた。彼は1694年7月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで89歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンアンシエント セメテリーにて埋葬された。

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Root Sr. nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1605, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Root I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ann Rushall, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Clark em 1640, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1637 e viveu em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1639 e em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1659. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1694, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Root Sr. родился 16 января 1605 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Root I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Rushall, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Clark в 1640 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году, а также жил в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году и в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1659 году. Он умер 17 июля 1694 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности ансиент кеметири, ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.
